def heap_sort(arr):
    import heapq
    h = list(arr)
    heapq.heapify(h)
    out = []
    while h:
        out.append(heapq.heappop(h))
    return out

code:
def reorganize_by_freq(s):
    import heapq
    from collections import Counter
    counts = Counter(s)
    heap = [(-v, ch) for ch, v in counts.items()]
    heapq.heapify(heap)
    out = []
    while heap:
        v, ch = heapq.heappop(heap)
        out.append(ch)
    return ''.join(out)
